rationale: Educ. Code §28.0253 governs the Texas First Early High School Completion Program. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13. No conflict exists.
quote: The agency, in coordination with the coordinating board, shall establish the Texas First Early High School Completion Program to allow public high school students who demonstrate early readiness for college to graduate early from high school.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education statute.
